revision.comment: 新規
revision.text:
'''大領神社'''（たいりょうじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[不破郡]][[垂井町]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[郷社]]。[[美濃国]][[一宮|二宮]]とされる。
[[南宮大社]]の[[摂社]]である。
==祭神== 宮勝木實（みやのすぐりのこのみ） *宮勝木實は、[[壬申の乱]]の際、[[大海人皇子]]（[[天武天皇]]）の命で、不破道（[[不破関]]付近）に出兵した人物。功績により、不破郡の[[大領]]になったという。
==所在地== *岐阜県不破郡垂井町宮代森下765 **[[南宮大社]]の東、約0.5km。
==歴史== *創建時期は不明。宮勝木實の死後の[[715年]]（[[霊亀]]元年）という説がある。 *[[1600年]]（[[慶長]]5年）の[[関ヶ原の戦い]]で社殿は焼失する。 *[[1636年]]（[[寛永]]13年）再建される。
[[Category:岐阜県の神社|たいりようしんしや]] [[Category:式内小社|たいりようしんしや]] [[Category:郷社|たいりようしんしや]] [[Category:垂井町|たいりようしんしや]] {{shinto-stub}}

== 文化財 == ;本巣市指定文化財 *木造獅子頭<ref>{{Cite web |date= |url=http://www.city.motosu.lg.jp/life/kyouiku/culture_asset/kaiga/ |title=絵画・彫刻 |publisher=本巣市 |accessdate=2013-05-20}}</ref>
==所在地== *岐阜県不破郡垂井町宮代森下765 **[[南宮大社]]の東、約0.5km。
==歴史== *創建時期は不明。宮勝木實の死後の[[715年]]（[[霊亀]]元年）という説がある。 *[[1600年]]（[[慶長]]5年）の[[関ヶ原の戦い]]で社殿は焼失する。 *[[1636年]]（[[寛永]]13年）再建される。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}

{{nihongo|'''Tairyō Shrine'''|大領神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tairyō Shrine'''|大領神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tairyō Shrine'''|大領神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tairyō Shrine'''|大領神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tairyō Shrine'''|大領神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Tairyō Shrine'''|大領神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tairyō Shrine'''|大領神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tairyō Shrine'''|大領神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{神社 | 名称 = 大領神社 | 画像 = [[Image:Dairyo Jinja Tarui01.jpg|250px]]
| 所在地 = [[岐阜県]][[不破郡]][[垂井町]]宮代森下765 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = 不破郡大領宮勝木實命 | 創建 = 不明、[[715年]]（[[霊亀]]元年）説あり | 社格 = [[式内小社]]、（伝）美濃国[[一宮#二宮、三宮|二宮]]、旧[[郷社]]、南宮大社摂社 | 例祭 = | 本殿 = | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=大領神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''大領神社'''（たいりょうじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[不破郡]][[垂井町]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内社]]で、旧[[近代社格制度|社格]]は[[郷社]]。[[美濃国]][[一宮#二宮、三宮|二宮]]とされる。 [[南宮大社]]の[[摂社]]である。 == 祭神 == ; [[宮勝木實]]（みやの すぐりの このみ） : 宮勝木實は、[[壬申の乱]]の際、大海人皇子（[[天武天皇]]）の命で、[[不破道]]（[[不破関]]付近）に出兵した人物。功績により、不破郡の[[大領]]になったという。 == 所在地 == * 岐阜県不破郡垂井町宮代森下765 *: [[南宮大社]]の東、約0.5km。 == 歴史 == * 創建時期は不明。宮勝木實の死後の[[715年]]（[[霊亀]]元年）という説がある * [[1600年]]（[[慶長]]5年） [[関ヶ原の戦い]]で社殿は焼失する * [[1636年]]（[[寛永]]13年） 再建される == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たいりようしんしや}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]]

It is located in [[Mino Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická (provincia)|ja|美濃国|ko|미노국|lt|Mino žemė|nl|Mino (provincie)|pt|Província de Mino|ru|Мино (провинция)|simple|Mino Province|sk|Mino (provincia)|sr|Провинција Мино|th|แคว้นมิโนะ|tr|Mino (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Міно|vi|Tỉnh Mino|wuu|美濃国|zh_min_nan|Mino-kok|zh_yue|美濃國|zh|美濃國|WD=Q864156}} * {{ill|Fuwa District, Gifu|lt=Fuwa district|ca|Districte de Fuwa|ceb|Fuwa-gun|en|Fuwa District, Gifu|es|Distrito de Fuwa (Gifu)|eu|Fuwa barrutia|fa|شهرستان فووا، گیفو|fr|District de Fuwa|gn|Fúgua amunda|id|Distrik Fuwa, Gifu|it|Distretto di Fuwa|ja|不破郡|ko|후와군|pl|Powiat Fuwa|pt|Distrito de https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181928 == image (P18) == * Dairyo Jinja Tarui01.jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181928 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|WD=Q135159299}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Gō-sha|lt=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7200005004952 == Commons category (P373) == * Dairyo-jinja == parent organization or unit (P749) == * {{ill|Nangū Taisha|lt=Nangū Taisha|en|Nangū Taisha|fa|نانگو تایشا|fr|Nangū-taisha|ja|南宮大社|zh|南宮大社|WD=Q704967}} ==References== [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] {{commons category|Dairyo-jinja}} [[JA:大領神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11441891}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|大領神社|version=107523142|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 | 名称 = 大領神社 | 画像 = [[Image:Dairyo Jinja Tarui01.jpg|250px]]
| 所在地 = [[岐阜県]][[不破郡]][[垂井町]]宮代森下765 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = 不破郡大領宮勝木實命 | 創建 = 不明、[[715年]]（[[霊亀]]元年）説あり | 社格 = [[式内小社]]、（伝）美濃国[[一宮#二宮、三宮|二宮]]、旧[[郷社]]、南宮大社摂社 | 例祭 = | 本殿 = | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=大領神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''大領神社'''（たいりょうじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[不破郡]][[垂井町]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内社]]で、旧[[近代社格制度|社格]]は[[郷社]]。[[美濃国]][[一宮#二宮、三宮|二宮]]とされる。 [[南宮大社]]の[[摂社]]である。 == 祭神 == ; [[宮勝木實]]（みやの すぐりの このみ） : 宮勝木實は、[[壬申の乱]]の際、大海人皇子（[[天武天皇]]）の命で、[[不破道]]（[[不破関]]付近）に出兵した人物。功績により、不破郡の[[大領]]になったという。 == 所在地 == * 岐阜県不破郡垂井町宮代森下765 *: [[南宮大社]]の東、約0.5km。 == 歴史 == * 創建時期は不明。宮勝木實の死後の[[715年]]（[[霊亀]]元年）という説がある * [[1600年]]（[[慶長]]5年） [[関ヶ原の戦い]]で社殿は焼失する * [[1636年]]（[[寛永]]13年） 再建される == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]]

[[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] {{commons category|Dairyo-jinja}} [[JA:大領神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11441891}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|大領神社|version=107523142|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 | 名称 = 大領神社 | 画像 = [[Image:Dairyo Jinja Tarui01.jpg|250px]]
| 所在地 = {{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|不破郡|Q521316}}{{jalink|垂井町|Q1345531}}宮代森下765 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = 不破郡大領宮勝木實命 | 創建 = 不明、{{jalink|715年|Q23528}}（{{jalink|霊亀|Q1373115}}元年）説あり | 社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}、（伝）美濃国{{jalink|一宮#二宮、三宮|Q1656379|二宮}}、旧{{jalink|郷社}}、南宮大社摂社 | 例祭 = | 本殿 = | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=大領神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''大領神社'''（たいりょうじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|不破郡|Q521316}}{{jalink|垂井町|Q1345531}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内社}}で、旧{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|社格}}は{{jalink|郷社}}。{{jalink|美濃国|Q864156}}{{jalink|一宮#二宮、三宮|Q1656379|二宮}}とされる。 {{jalink|南宮大社|Q704967}}の{{jalink|摂社|Q135009904}}である。 == 祭神 == ; {{jalink|宮勝木實}}（みやの すぐりの このみ） : 宮勝木實は、{{jalink|壬申の乱|Q2378252}}の際、大海人皇子（{{jalink|天武天皇|Q335181}}）の命で、{{jalink|不破道}}（{{jalink|不破関|Q10868912}}付近）に出兵した人物。功績により、不破郡の{{jalink|大領|Q11441890}}になったという。 == 所在地 == * 岐阜県不破郡垂井町宮代森下765 *: {{jalink|南宮大社|Q704967}}の東、約0.5km。 == 歴史 == * 創建時期は不明。宮勝木實の死後の{{jalink|715年|Q23528}}（{{jalink|霊亀|Q1373115}}元年）という説がある * {{jalink|1600年|Q6720}}（{{jalink|慶長|Q1328185}}5年） {{jalink|関ヶ原の戦い|Q234188}}で社殿は焼失する * {{jalink|1636年|Q6885}}（{{jalink|寛永|Q1192913}}13年） 再建される == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]]

| 所在地 = {{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|不破郡|Q521316}}{{jalink|垂井町|Q1345531}}宮代森下765 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = 不破郡大領宮勝木實命 | 創建 = 不明、{{jalink|715年|Q23528}}（{{jalink|霊亀|Q1373115}}元年）説あり | 社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}、（伝）美濃国{{jalink|一宮#二宮、三宮|Q1656379|二宮}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}、南宮大社摂社 | 例祭 = | 本殿 = | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=大領神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''大領神社'''（たいりょうじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|不破郡|Q521316}}{{jalink|垂井町|Q1345531}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内社}}で、旧{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|社格}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。{{jalink|美濃国|Q864156}}{{jalink|一宮#二宮、三宮|Q1656379|二宮}}とされる。 {{jalink|南宮大社|Q704967}}の{{jalink|摂社|Q135009904}}である。 === 祭神 === ; {{jalink|宮勝木實}}（みやの すぐりの このみ） : 宮勝木實は、{{jalink|壬申の乱|Q2378252}}の際、大海人皇子（{{jalink|天武天皇|Q335181}}）の命で、{{jalink|不破道}}（{{jalink|不破関|Q10868912}}付近）に出兵した人物。功績により、不破郡の{{jalink|大領|Q11441890}}になったという。 === 所在地 === * 岐阜県不破郡垂井町宮代森下765 *: {{jalink|南宮大社|Q704967}}の東、約0.5km。 === 歴史 === * 創建時期は不明。宮勝木實の死後の{{jalink|715年|Q23528}}（{{jalink|霊亀|Q1373115}}元年）という説がある * {{jalink|1600年|Q6720}}（{{jalink|慶長|Q1328185}}5年） {{jalink|関ヶ原の戦い|Q234188}}で社殿は焼失する * {{jalink|1636年|Q6885}}（{{jalink|寛永|Q1192913}}13年） 再建される === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たいりようしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]]

| 所在地 = {{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|不破郡|Q521316}}{{jalink|垂井町|Q1345531}}宮代森下765 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = 不破郡大領宮勝木實命 | 創建 = 不明、{{jalink|715年|Q23528}}（{{jalink|霊亀|Q1373115}}元年）説あり | 社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}、（伝）美濃国{{jalink|一宮#二宮、三宮|Q1656379|二宮}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}、南宮大社摂社 | 例祭 = | 本殿 = | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=大領神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''大領神社'''（たいりょうじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|不破郡|Q521316}}{{jalink|垂井町|Q1345531}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内社}}で、旧{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|社格}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。{{jalink|美濃国|Q864156}}{{jalink|一宮#二宮、三宮|Q1656379|二宮}}とされる。 {{jalink|南宮大社|Q704967}}の{{jalink|摂社|Q135009904}}である。 === 祭神 === ; {{jalink|宮勝木實}}（みやの すぐりの このみ） : 宮勝木實は、{{jalink|壬申の乱|Q2378252}}の際、大海人皇子（{{jalink|天武天皇|Q335181}}）の命で、{{jalink|不破道}}（{{jalink|不破関|Q10868912}}付近）に出兵した人物。功績により、不破郡の{{jalink|大領|Q11441890}}になったという。 === 所在地 === * 岐阜県不破郡垂井町宮代森下765 *: {{jalink|南宮大社|Q704967}}の東、約0.5km。 === 歴史 === * 創建時期は不明。宮勝木實の死後の{{jalink|715年|Q23528}}（{{jalink|霊亀|Q1373115}}元年）という説がある * {{jalink|1600年|Q6720}}（{{jalink|慶長|Q1328185}}5年） {{jalink|関ヶ原の戦い|Q234188}}で社殿は焼失する * {{jalink|1636年|Q6885}}（{{jalink|寛永|Q1192913}}13年） 再建される === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たいりようしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]] [[Category:need translation]]

| 所在地 = {{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|不破郡|Q521316}}{{jalink|垂井町|Q1345531}}宮代森下765 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = 不破郡大領宮勝木實命 | 創建 = 不明、{{jalink|715年|Q23528}}（{{jalink|霊亀|Q1373115}}元年）説あり | 社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}、（伝）美濃国{{jalink|一宮#二宮、三宮|Q1656379|二宮}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}、南宮大社摂社 | 例祭 = | 本殿 = | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=大領神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''大領神社'''（たいりょうじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|不破郡|Q521316}}{{jalink|垂井町|Q1345531}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内社}}で、旧{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|社格}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。{{jalink|美濃国|Q864156}}{{jalink|一宮#二宮、三宮|Q1656379|二宮}}とされる。 {{jalink|南宮大社|Q704967}}の{{jalink|摂社|Q135009904}}である。 === 祭神 === ; {{jalink|宮勝木實}}（みやの すぐりの このみ） : 宮勝木實は、{{jalink|壬申の乱|Q2378252}}の際、大海人皇子（{{jalink|天武天皇|Q335181}}）の命で、{{jalink|不破道}}（{{jalink|不破関|Q10868912}}付近）に出兵した人物。功績により、不破郡の{{jalink|大領|Q11441890}}になったという。 === 所在地 === * 岐阜県不破郡垂井町宮代森下765 *: {{jalink|南宮大社|Q704967}}の東、約0.5km。 === 歴史 === * 創建時期は不明。宮勝木實の死後の{{jalink|715年|Q23528}}（{{jalink|霊亀|Q1373115}}元年）という説がある * {{jalink|1600年|Q6720}}（{{jalink|慶長|Q1328185}}5年） {{jalink|関ヶ原の戦い|Q234188}}で社殿は焼失する * {{jalink|1636年|Q6885}}（{{jalink|寛永|Q1192913}}13年） 再建される === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たいりようしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]] [[Category:need translation]]

[[Image:Dairyo Jinja Tarui01.jpg|250px]]
| 所在地 = {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Fuwa District|Q521316}}{{jalink|Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531}} Miyashiro Morishita 765 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = Fuwa District Governor Miyakatsuki Konomi-no-Mikoto | 創建 = unknown, with a theory of {{jalink|715|Q23528}} (Reiki 1) | 社格 = {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}, (trad.) {{jalink|Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|Ninomiya}} of Mino Province, former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}, Sessha of Nangū Taisha | 例祭 = | 本殿 = | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tairyō Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tairyō Shrine''' (たいりょうじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531}}, {{jalink|Fuwa District|Q521316}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and under the old {{jalink|modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|shrine rank}} it was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. It is regarded as the {{jalink|Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|Ninomiya}} of {{jalink|Mino Province|Q864156}}. It is a {{jalink|sessha|Q135009904}} of {{jalink|Nangū Taisha|Q704967}}. === Enshrined deity === ; {{jalink|Miyakatsuki Konomi}} (みやの すぐりの このみ) : Miyakatsuki Konomi was the person who, during the {{jalink|Jinshin War|Q2378252}}, was ordered by Prince Ōama ({{jalink|Emperor Tenmu|Q335181}}) to send troops to {{jalink|Fuwa Road}} (near {{jalink|Fuwa Barrier|Q10868912}}). It is said that by his achievements he became {{jalink|Dairyō|Q11441890}} of Fuwa District. === Location === * 765 Miyashiro Morishita, Tarui-chō, Fuwa-gun, Gifu Prefecture *: About 0.5 km east of {{jalink|Nangū Taisha|Q704967}}. === History === * Founding period unknown. One theory gives {{jalink|715|Q23528}} (Reiki 1), after the death of Miyakatsuki Konomi. * {{jalink|1600|Q6720}} (Keichō 5): shrine buildings burned in the {{jalink|Battle of Sekigahara|Q234188}}. * {{jalink|1636|Q6885}} (Kan'ei 13): rebuilt. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たいりようしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]] [[Category:need translation]]

[[Image:Dairyo Jinja Tarui01.jpg|250px]]
| 所在地 = {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Fuwa District|Q521316}}{{jalink|Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531}} Miyashiro Morishita 765 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = Fuwa District Governor Miyakatsuki Konomi-no-Mikoto | 創建 = unknown, with a theory of {{jalink|715|Q23528}} (Reiki 1) | 社格 = {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}, (trad.) {{jalink|Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|Ninomiya}} of Mino Province, former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}, Sessha of Nangū Taisha | 例祭 = | 本殿 = | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tairyō Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tairyō Shrine''' (たいりょうじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531}}, {{jalink|Fuwa District|Q521316}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and under the old {{jalink|modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|shrine rank}} it was {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. It is regarded as the {{jalink|Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|Ninomiya}} of {{jalink|Mino Province|Q864156}}. It is a {{jalink|sessha|Q135009904}} of {{jalink|Nangū Taisha|Q704967}}. === Enshrined deity === ; {{jalink|Miyakatsuki Konomi}} (みやの すぐりの このみ) : Miyakatsuki Konomi was the person who, during the {{jalink|Jinshin War|Q2378252}}, was ordered by Prince Ōama ({{jalink|Emperor Tenmu|Q335181}}) to send troops to {{jalink|Fuwa Road}} (near {{jalink|Fuwa Barrier|Q10868912}}). It is said that by his achievements he became {{jalink|Dairyō|Q11441890}} of Fuwa District. === Location === * 765 Miyashiro Morishita, Tarui-chō, Fuwa-gun, Gifu Prefecture *: About 0.5 km east of {{jalink|Nangū Taisha|Q704967}}. === History === * Founding period unknown. One theory gives {{jalink|715|Q23528}} (Reiki 1), after the death of Miyakatsuki Konomi. * {{jalink|1600|Q6720}} (Keichō 5): shrine buildings burned in the {{jalink|Battle of Sekigahara|Q234188}}. * {{jalink|1636|Q6885}} (Kan'ei 13): rebuilt. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たいりようしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]] [[Category:need translation]]

One theory gives {{jalink|715|Q23528}} (Reiki 1), after the death of Miyakatsuki Konomi. * {{jalink|1600|Q6720}} (Keichō 5): shrine buildings burned in the {{jalink|Battle of Sekigahara|Q234188}}. * {{jalink|1636|Q6885}} (Kan'ei 13): rebuilt. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たいりようしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]]

It is a {{ill|lt=sessha|Q135009904|WD=Q135009904}} of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967}}. === Enshrined deity === ; {{ill||lt=Miyakatsuki Konomi|UNKNOWN}} (みやの すぐりの このみ) : Miyakatsuki Konomi was the person who, during the {{ill|lt=Jinshin War|Q2378252|WD=Q2378252}}, was ordered by Prince Ōama ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenmu|Q335181|WD=Q335181}}) to send troops to {{ill||lt=Fuwa Road|UNKNOWN}} (near {{ill|lt=Fuwa Barrier|Q10868912|WD=Q10868912}}). It is said that by his achievements he became {{ill|lt=Dairyō|Q11441890|WD=Q11441890}} of Fuwa District. === Location === * 765 Miyashiro Morishita, Tarui-chō, Fuwa-gun, Gifu Prefecture *: About 0.5 km east of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967}}. === History === * Founding period unknown. One theory gives {{ill|lt=715|Q23528|WD=Q23528}} (Reiki 1), after the death of Miyakatsuki Konomi. * {{ill|lt=1600|Q6720|WD=Q6720}} (Keichō 5): shrine buildings burned in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Sekigahara|Q234188|WD=Q234188}}. * {{ill|lt=1636|Q6885|WD=Q6885}} (Kan'ei 13): rebuilt. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たいりようしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It is located in [[Mino Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická Jinja Tarui01.jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181928 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|lt=Q135159299|WD=Q135159299}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|WD=Q3029647}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|lt=Q17|WD=Q17}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7200005004952 == Commons category (P373) == * Dairyo-jinja == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県不破郡垂井町宮代森下765', 'language': 'ja'} == parent organization or unit (P749) == * {{ill|Nangū Taisha|lt=Nangū Taisha|en|Nangū Taisha|fa|نانگو تایشا|fr|Nangū-taisha|ja|南宮大社|zh|南宮大社|WD=Q704967}} {{commons category|Category:Dairyo-jinja}} [[JA:大領神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11441891}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称 = Tairyō Shrine | 画像 = [[Image:Dairyo Jinja Tarui01.jpg|250px]]
| 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}{{ill|lt=Fuwa District|Q521316|WD=Q521316}}{{ill|lt=Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531|WD=Q1345531}} Miyashiro Morishita 765 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = Fuwa District Governor Miyakatsuki Konomi-no-Mikoto | 創建 = unknown, with a theory of {{ill|lt=715|Q23528|WD=Q23528}} (Reiki 1) | 社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}, (trad.) {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|WD=Q1656379|lt=Ninomiya}} of Mino Province, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}, Sessha of Nangū Taisha | 例祭 = | 本殿 = | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tairyō Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tairyō Shrine''' (たいりょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531|WD=Q1345531}}, {{ill|lt=Fuwa District|Q521316|WD=Q521316}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}, and under the old {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=shrine rank}} it was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|WD=Q1656379|lt=Ninomiya}} of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156}}. It is a {{ill|lt=sessha|Q135009904|WD=Q135009904}} of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967}}. === Enshrined deity === ; {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Miyakatsuki Konomi|1=UNKNOWN}} (みやの すぐりの このみ) : Miyakatsuki Konomi was the person who, during the {{ill|lt=Jinshin War|Q2378252|WD=Q2378252}}, was ordered by Prince Ōama ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenmu|Q335181|WD=Q335181}}) to send troops to {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Fuwa Road|1=UNKNOWN}} (near {{ill|lt=Fuwa Barrier|Q10868912|WD=Q10868912}}). It is said that by his achievements he became {{ill|lt=Dairyō|Q11441890|WD=Q11441890}} of Fuwa District. === Location === * 765 Miyashiro Morishita, Tarui-chō, Fuwa-gun, Gifu Prefecture *: About 0.5 km east of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967}}. === History === * Founding period unknown. One theory gives {{ill|lt=715|Q23528|WD=Q23528}} (Reiki 1), after the death of Miyakatsuki Konomi. * {{ill|lt=1600|Q6720|WD=Q6720}} (Keichō 5): shrine buildings burned in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Sekigahara|Q234188|WD=Q234188}}. * {{ill|lt=1636|Q6885|WD=Q6885}} (Kan'ei 13): rebuilt. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たいりようしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

画像 = [[Image:Dairyo Jinja Tarui01.jpg|250px]]
| 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Fuwa District|Q521316|WD=Q521316|1=Fuwa District, Gifu}}{{ill|lt=Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531|WD=Q1345531|1=Tarui, Gifu}} Miyashiro Morishita 765 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = Fuwa District Governor Miyakatsuki Konomi-no-Mikoto | 創建 = unknown, with a theory of {{ill|lt=715|Q23528|WD=Q23528|1=715}} (Reiki 1) | 社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}, (trad.) {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|WD=Q1656379|lt=Ninomiya|1=Ichinomiya}} of Mino Province, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, Sessha of Nangū Taisha | 例祭 = | 本殿 = | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tairyō Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tairyō Shrine''' (たいりょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531|WD=Q1345531|1=Tarui, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Fuwa District|Q521316|WD=Q521316|1=Fuwa District, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and under the old {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} it was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|WD=Q1656379|lt=Ninomiya|1=Ichinomiya}} of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}. It is a {{ill|lt=sessha|Q135009904|WD=Q135009904|1=Sessha}} of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967|1=Nangū Taisha}}. === Enshrined deity === ; {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Miyakatsuki Konomi|1=UNKNOWN}} (みやの すぐりの このみ) : Miyakatsuki Konomi was the person who, during the {{ill|lt=Jinshin War|Q2378252|WD=Q2378252|1=Jinshin War}}, was ordered by Prince Ōama ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenmu|Q335181|WD=Q335181|1=Emperor Tenmu}}) to send troops to {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Fuwa Road|1=UNKNOWN}} (near {{ill|lt=Fuwa Barrier|Q10868912|WD=Q10868912|1=Fuwa no Seki}}). It is said that by his achievements he became {{ill|lt=Dairyō|Q11441890|WD=Q11441890|1=Dairyō}} of Fuwa District. === Location === * 765 Miyashiro Morishita, Tarui-chō, Fuwa-gun, Gifu Prefecture *: About 0.5 km east of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967|1=Nangū Taisha}}. === History === * Founding period unknown. One theory gives {{ill|lt=715|Q23528|WD=Q23528|1=715}} (Reiki 1), after the death of Miyakatsuki Konomi. * {{ill|lt=1600|Q6720|WD=Q6720|1=1600}} (Keichō 5): shrine buildings burned in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Sekigahara|Q234188|WD=Q234188|1=Battle of Sekigahara}}. * {{ill|lt=1636|Q6885|WD=Q6885|1=1636}} (Kan'ei 13): rebuilt. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たいりようしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It is a {{ill|lt=sessha|Q135009904|WD=Q135009904|1=Sessha}} of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967|1=Nangū Taisha}}. === Enshrined deity === ; {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Miyakatsuki Konomi|1=UNKNOWN}} (みやの すぐりの このみ) : Miyakatsuki Konomi was the person who, during the {{ill|lt=Jinshin War|Q2378252|WD=Q2378252|1=Jinshin War}}, was ordered by Prince Ōama ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenmu|Q335181|WD=Q335181|1=Emperor Tenmu}}) to send troops to {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Fuwa Road|1=UNKNOWN}} (near {{ill|lt=Fuwa Barrier|Q10868912|WD=Q10868912|1=Fuwa no Seki}}). It is said that by his achievements he became {{ill|lt=Dairyō|Q11441890|WD=Q11441890|1=Dairyō}} of Fuwa District. === Location === * 765 Miyashiro Morishita, Tarui-chō, Fuwa-gun, Gifu Prefecture *: About 0.5 km east of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967|1=Nangū Taisha}}. === History === * Founding period unknown. One theory gives {{ill|lt=715|Q23528|WD=Q23528|1=715}} (Reiki 1), after the death of Miyakatsuki Konomi. * {{ill|lt=1600|Q6720|WD=Q6720|1=1600}} (Keichō 5): shrine buildings burned in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Sekigahara|Q234188|WD=Q234188|1=Battle of Sekigahara}}. * {{ill|lt=1636|Q6885|WD=Q6885|1=1636}} (Kan'ei 13): rebuilt. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たいりようしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]][[Category:qq]]

画像 = [[Image:Dairyo Jinja Tarui01.jpg|250px]]
| 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Fuwa District|Q521316|WD=Q521316|1=Fuwa District, Gifu}}{{ill|lt=Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531|WD=Q1345531|1=Tarui, Gifu}} Miyashiro Morishita 765 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = Fuwa District Governor Miyakatsuki Konomi-no-Mikoto | 創建 = unknown, with a theory of {{ill|lt=715|Q23528|WD=Q23528|1=715}} (Reiki 1) | 社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}, (trad.) {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|WD=Q1656379|lt=Ninomiya|1=Ichinomiya}} of Mino Province, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, Sessha of Nangū Taisha | 例祭 = | 本殿 = | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tairyō Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tairyō Shrine''' (たいりょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531|WD=Q1345531|1=Tarui, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Fuwa District|Q521316|WD=Q521316|1=Fuwa District, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and under the old {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} it was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|WD=Q1656379|lt=Ninomiya|1=Ichinomiya}} of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}. It is a {{ill|lt=sessha|Q135009904|WD=Q135009904|1=Sessha}} of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967|1=Nangū Taisha}}. === Enshrined deity === ; {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Miyakatsuki Konomi|1=UNKNOWN}} (みやの すぐりの このみ) : Miyakatsuki Konomi was the person who, during the {{ill|lt=Jinshin War|Q2378252|WD=Q2378252|1=Jinshin War}}, was ordered by Prince Ōama ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenmu|Q335181|WD=Q335181|1=Emperor Tenmu}}) to send troops to {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Fuwa Road|1=UNKNOWN}} (near {{ill|lt=Fuwa Barrier|Q10868912|WD=Q10868912|1=Fuwa no Seki}}). It is said that by his achievements he became {{ill|lt=Dairyō|Q11441890|WD=Q11441890|1=Dairyō}} of Fuwa District. === Location === * 765 Miyashiro Morishita, Tarui-chō, Fuwa-gun, Gifu Prefecture *: About 0.5 km east of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967|1=Nangū Taisha}}. === History === * Founding period unknown. One theory gives {{ill|lt=715|Q23528|WD=Q23528|1=715}} (Reiki 1), after the death of Miyakatsuki Konomi. * {{ill|lt=1600|Q6720|WD=Q6720|1=1600}} (Keichō 5): shrine buildings burned in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Sekigahara|Q234188|WD=Q234188|1=Battle of Sekigahara}}. * {{ill|lt=1636|Q6885|WD=Q6885|1=1636}} (Kan'ei 13): rebuilt. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]]

| 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Fuwa District|Q521316|WD=Q521316|1=Fuwa District, Gifu}}{{ill|lt=Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531|WD=Q1345531|1=Tarui, Gifu}} Miyashiro Morishita 765 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = Fuwa District Governor Miyakatsuki Konomi-no-Mikoto | 創建 = unknown, with a theory of {{ill|lt=715|Q23528|WD=Q23528|1=715}} (Reiki 1) | 社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}, (trad.) {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|WD=Q1656379|lt=Ninomiya|1=Ichinomiya}} of Mino Province, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, Sessha of Nangū Taisha | 例祭 = | 本殿 = | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tairyō Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tairyō Shrine''' (たいりょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531|WD=Q1345531|1=Tarui, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Fuwa District|Q521316|WD=Q521316|1=Fuwa District, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and under the old {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} it was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|WD=Q1656379|lt=Ninomiya|1=Ichinomiya}} of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}. It is a {{ill|lt=sessha|Q135009904|WD=Q135009904|1=Sessha}} of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967|1=Nangū Taisha}}. === Enshrined deity === ; {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Miyakatsuki Konomi|1=UNKNOWN}} (みやの すぐりの このみ) : Miyakatsuki Konomi was the person who, during the {{ill|lt=Jinshin War|Q2378252|WD=Q2378252|1=Jinshin War}}, was ordered by Prince Ōama ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenmu|Q335181|WD=Q335181|1=Emperor Tenmu}}) to send troops to {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Fuwa Road|1=UNKNOWN}} (near {{ill|lt=Fuwa Barrier|Q10868912|WD=Q10868912|1=Fuwa no Seki}}). It is said that by his achievements he became {{ill|lt=Dairyō|Q11441890|WD=Q11441890|1=Dairyō}} of Fuwa District. === Location === * 765 Miyashiro Morishita, Tarui-chō, Fuwa-gun, Gifu Prefecture *: About 0.5 km east of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967|1=Nangū Taisha}}. === History === * Founding period unknown. One theory gives {{ill|lt=715|Q23528|WD=Q23528|1=715}} (Reiki 1), after the death of Miyakatsuki Konomi. * {{ill|lt=1600|Q6720|WD=Q6720|1=1600}} (Keichō 5): shrine buildings burned in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Sekigahara|Q234188|WD=Q234188|1=Battle of Sekigahara}}. * {{ill|lt=1636|Q6885|WD=Q6885|1=1636}} (Kan'ei 13): rebuilt. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]]

| 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Fuwa District|Q521316|WD=Q521316|1=Fuwa District, Gifu}}{{ill|lt=Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531|WD=Q1345531|1=Tarui, Gifu}} Miyashiro Morishita 765 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = Fuwa District Governor Miyakatsuki Konomi-no-Mikoto | 創建 = unknown, with a theory of {{ill|lt=715|Q23528|WD=Q23528|1=715}} (Reiki 1) | 社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}, (trad.) {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|WD=Q1656379|lt=Ninomiya|1=Ichinomiya}} of Mino Province, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, Sessha of Nangū Taisha | 例祭 = | 本殿 = | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tairyō Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tairyō Shrine''' (たいりょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Tarui, Gifu|Q1345531|WD=Q1345531|1=Tarui, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Fuwa District|Q521316|WD=Q521316|1=Fuwa District, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and under the old {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} it was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya#Ninomiya and Sannomiya|Q1656379|WD=Q1656379|lt=Ninomiya|1=Ichinomiya}} of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}. It is a {{ill|lt=sessha|Q135009904|WD=Q135009904|1=Sessha}} of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967|1=Nangū Taisha}}. === Enshrined deity === ; {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Miyakatsuki Konomi|1=UNKNOWN}} (みやの すぐりの このみ) : Miyakatsuki Konomi was the person who, during the {{ill|lt=Jinshin War|Q2378252|WD=Q2378252|1=Jinshin War}}, was ordered by Prince Ōama ({{ill|lt=Emperor Tenmu|Q335181|WD=Q335181|1=Emperor Tenmu}}) to send troops to {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Fuwa Road|1=UNKNOWN}} (near {{ill|lt=Fuwa Barrier|Q10868912|WD=Q10868912|1=Fuwa no Seki}}). It is said that by his achievements he became {{ill|lt=Dairyō|Q11441890|WD=Q11441890|1=Dairyō}} of Fuwa District. === Location === * 765 Miyashiro Morishita, Tarui-chō, Fuwa-gun, Gifu Prefecture *: About 0.5 km east of {{ill|lt=Nangū Taisha|Q704967|WD=Q704967|1=Nangū Taisha}}. === History === * Founding period unknown. One theory gives {{ill|lt=715|Q23528|WD=Q23528|1=715}} (Reiki 1), after the death of Miyakatsuki Konomi. * {{ill|lt=1600|Q6720|WD=Q6720|1=1600}} (Keichō 5): shrine buildings burned in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Sekigahara|Q234188|WD=Q234188|1=Battle of Sekigahara}}. * {{ill|lt=1636|Q6885|WD=Q6885|1=1636}} (Kan'ei 13): rebuilt. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=岐阜県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tairyō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:垂井町の建築物]] [[Category:垂井町の歴史]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:宮勝氏|社たいりよう]]
